name: bootstrap eval: rules without seed/fp-examples/<rule-id>/ are skipped (logged as "no bootstrap fixtures") rather than failing the install
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --rule-id no-fixtures-rule 2>out.txt && grep -E "no bootstrap fixtures" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
